steps.title: Identify the proportional relationship
steps.content: When Tanya works z hours, she earns 13.50z dollars. This establishes a direct proportion: earnings scale proportionally with hours. If the number of hours multiplies by a factor, earnings multiply by that same factor.

steps.title: Apply the scaling factor
steps.content:
Tanya now works 3z hours, which is 3 times as many hours as z. Therefore, her earnings also multiply by 3:

$$3 \times (13.50z)$$

This matches choice A — A is correct.
